task_completion.description: Verify the FZK-Haus model is loaded in Bonsai/BlenderBIM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai/BlenderBIM interface is open, showing the 3D model of the house in the viewport and/or the IFC project tree in the outliner.

task_completion.description: Verify that all door elements are removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: IfcDoor elements are selected in the outliner or 3D viewport and subsequently deleted (they should disappear from the IFC outliner tree).

task_completion.description: Verify that all window elements are removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: IfcWindow elements are selected in the outliner or 3D viewport and subsequently deleted (they should disappear from the IFC outliner tree).

task_completion.description: Verify that walls, slabs, and geometric holes are preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: IfcWall, IfcSlab, and IfcOpeningElement entities remain visible in the outliner tree and 3D viewport after the doors and windows have been removed.

task_completion.description: Verify the resulting model is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save or export dialog in Blender/Bonsai showing the file being saved exactly to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_structural_only.ifc', or a terminal/file manager verifying this file was created.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Bonsai/BlenderBIM GUI to perform the subsetting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Blender interface (outliner, viewport, menus) rather than a terminal window running a Python/IfcOpenShell script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify elements were deleted, not just hidden.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the Blender outliner, the IfcDoor and IfcWindow items should be completely removed from the tree, not just have their visibility (eye icon) toggled off.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the BlenderBIM save/export functionality to create the new file, rather than just copying the original file in the terminal without modifying it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output path is /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_structural_only.ifc. The original model contains exactly 13 Walls, 4 Slabs, 5 Doors, 11 Windows, and 17 IfcOpeningElements. A successful task will show the removal of the 5 Doors and 11 Windows, while preserving the 13 Walls, 4 Slabs, and 17 IfcOpeningElements.
